title: AI Image Optimization
description: Model-optimized photo derivatives (jimp) before the vision call; originals preserved; upload-side .ai.jpg sibling + A/B accuracy guardrail.
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). IMAGE_OPTIMIZATION_ENABLED is OFF ⇒ the original photo is sent unchanged (byte-identical); remove jimp only if otherwise unused.
Revert the sync PR; remove jimp if unused.
compatibilityNotes: Adds a jimp dependency — reconcile the downstream lockfile.
